ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Legal Finalization'), Not(Demand_Letter__c), Not(Allotment_Letter__c), Not(Legal_Loan_Uploads_Successful__c), Not(Cost_Break_up_Sheet__c), Not(NOC__c), Not(TPA__c), Not(EFT__c), Not(Others__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill all the mandatory checkboxes in Loan Details Section
